strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (15+ years) heavily utilizing the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) across multiple senior and staff-level roles.

response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman whose extensive background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React aligns closely with the core requirements of the Senior Fullstack Developer role. His recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and strong foundation in cloud platforms, containerization, and testing methodologies heavily outweigh the lack of explicit mentions of Nest.js and Vitest. Furthermore, his history of leading workshops and architectural initiatives demonstrates the excellent communication and problem-solving skills expected of a senior individual contributor.
